ads.removeUpsell: Prefer no ads? Subscriptions remove them.

app.name: 2nd-Brain
app.tagline: A second brain built from what you write and save.

journal.privacyFootnote: Your entries stay encrypted and never train any model.

errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection.

drilldown.backHint: Returns from the Pattern Core drilldown to the full constellation.

coreIntro.work: This is the Growth Core. Your career and growth pieces gather here.
coreIntro.relation: This is the Bond Core. Memories, promises, and conversations gather here.
coreIntro.knowledge: This is the Wisdom Core. Learned and understood pieces gather here.
coreIntro.records: This is the Narrative Core. Kept pieces gather here so you can find them again.
coreIntro.taste: This is the Muse Core. Taste and inspiration pieces gather here.

drilldown.noDataBody: Only pieces you write or save yourself appear here. Leave one piece and this core will grow a light snowflake node.
drilldown.dataDetailHint: Opens the selected Pattern Data detail.

navPieceSummary: Opens this piece summary and tags
navOpenAngleVillage: Opens this village in SecondB from a new angle
